$comment: Phase 1 G3 part 2 — smoke-test orchestration. Activated by `--launch-profile Phase1Smoke` (DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=Phase1Smoke). When this layer applies, AppHost's Program.cs reads Bridge:Phase1Smoke:EnableRelayInstance and launches a second Sunfish.Bridge instance in Relay posture alongside the default SaaS bridge-web. Acceptance criterion: GET /health on both Kestrel endpoints returns 200.
